scripts.dev: concurrently -n renderer,desktop -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter renderer dev" "pnpm --filter desktop dev"
scripts.build: pnpm check && pnpm --filter renderer build && pnpm --filter desktop build
scripts.check: pnpm --filter @harness/shared check && pnpm --filter @harness/core check && pnpm --filter renderer check && pnpm --filter desktop check
